# feast

> feast is a Kubernetes component. deploying 2 workload(s) (controller-manager, controller-manager) with 2 container(s). watching 12 resource type(s). exposing 1 service(s) on ports: 6566. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 3000, 8080. connecting to external services: gcs, grpc, postgres, redis, s3, sqlite. runtime dependencies: MongoDB, OpenTelemetry Collector, PostgreSQL, S3. 28 Python package dependencies (28 required), categories: 1 data, 1 database, 1 numerical, 1 observability, 1 web-framework, 1 web-server, 2 serialization. exposing 46 Prometheus metrics. Python k8s client with 173 API call(s). integrates with management relationship via labels/annotations.
